title: Meet George Moussa, Co-Owner and Coach at Alpha Athletes.
hook: Meet George Moussa, Co-Owner and Coach at Alpha Athletes.
caption:
Meet George Moussa, Co-Owner and Coach at Alpha Athletes.

George’s coaching approach has been shaped by more than qualifications and competition experience. It comes from his own journey through low self-esteem, depression, anxiety and addiction—and the role strength training played in rebuilding his life.

Since being introduced to powerlifting in 2019, George has added more than 200kg to his total. More importantly, he’s developed the experience and understanding to help other people work through their own challenges.

His coaching style is relaxed, empathetic and supportive. He works with

title: Have you ever promised yourself you'd start a new healthy habit... only to forget about it a few days later?
hook: Have you ever promised yourself you'd start a new healthy habit... only to forget about it a few days later?
caption:
Have you ever promised yourself you'd start a new healthy habit... only to forget about it a few days later?

You're not alone.

The problem usually isn't a lack of motivation.

It's that you're asking your brain to remember one more thing in an already busy day.

One of the simplest ways to make a new habit stick is by using something called habit stacking.

Instead of creating a completely new routine, you attach your new habit to one you already do automatically.

For example:

☕ After I make my morning coffee, I'll drink a glass of water.
🚶 After dinner, I'll go for a 10-minute walk.
🪥 Aft

title: Lo prometido es deuda. Aquí les dejo la receta de mi ceviche favorito. Después de varios intentos fallidos….
hook: Lo prometido es deuda. Aquí les dejo la receta de mi ceviche favorito. Después de varios intentos fallidos….
caption:
Lo prometido es deuda. Aquí les dejo la receta de mi ceviche favorito. Después de varios intentos fallidos….

Ingredientes:
• 1 lb de corvina fresca en cubos pequeños
• Jugo de 4-5 limones verdes
• Jugo de ½ naranja
• ½ cebolla morada en tiras finas
• 2 mini pimientos dulces, picados
• ½ taza de cilantro picado
• 1 mango en cubitos (opcional) 🥭
• 1 cucharadita de sal
• Pimienta al gusto
• 1 cucharada de aceite de oliva
• 1 aguacate en cubos (al servir)

Preparación:
Marina la corvina con el limón, la naranja y la sal durante 30–40 minutos en la nevera. Agrega la cebolla, los pimientos, el cila

title: Your greatest battle was never with the world.
hook: Your greatest battle was never with the world.
caption:
Your greatest battle was never with the world.

It has always been with your own mind.

The moment you stop letting your circumstances control your thoughts is the moment you become unstoppable.

Master your mind. Everything else follows. ⚔️🧠🏛️

title: Coming back from injury is tough!! 😓
hook: Coming back from injury is tough!! 😓
caption:
Coming back from injury is tough!! 😓

And I’m not just talking about the rehab or physical toll, but the mental resilience it takes to have another crack.

But, it’s a hell of a lot easier when you’ve got people in your corner who’ve been there & know EXACTLY how to keep you injury-free 🤝🏽 

Smart programming is how we achieved this (along with marvellous execution on my clients behalf 👏🏽) - and it’s what I’m bloody good at 😎

If you’ve also got unfinished business, you know what to do 📩

#halfmara #sub2 #onlinecoaching #strength #injuryprevention

title: CLEAR YOUR SYSTEM OVERHEAD. 🗑️❌
hook: CLEAR YOUR SYSTEM OVERHEAD. 🗑️❌
caption:

We all want to scale our lives to the next tier. We want new revenue streams, elite technical skills, sharper discipline, and a high-authority brand. We set our sights on these objectives and prepare to build.

But we try to do it while dragging along the dead weight of our past.

title: The most dangerous career advice ever given to capable women is “do what you're good at.”
hook: The most dangerous career advice ever given to capable women is “do what you're good at.”
caption:
The most dangerous career advice ever given to capable women is “do what you're good at.”

Nobody mentions there are two kinds of good at and only one of them is survivable at scale.

Do the two-column exercise tonight. The second list is usually longer. That's the problem but it's fixable.

Send this to the most capable woman you know. She needs it most. 💚

#burnoutrecovery #womeninleadership #corporateburnout #mindsetcoach #boundaries #restisproductive #workingmums #careerwomen #sustainablesuccess #energymanagement

title: Most people don’t need to hustle harder.
hook: Most people don’t need to hustle harder.
caption:
Most people don’t need to hustle harder.

They need to get more aligned.

Because when your actions, values, and vision are moving in different directions, no amount of hard work will create the life you want.

Intentional action beats constant action.

Before you ask, “What’s next?” ask yourself, “Does this move me closer to the life I’m intentionally creating?”

One aligned decision repeated consistently will always outperform endless busy work.

If you’re ready to stop spinning your wheels and start building a life and business with purpose, join my free community. That’s where we turn inte
